parsed_verdict.reasoning: Stage 1 contains 6 top-level rules, well under the N9 threshold. Cross-rule references appear throughout (rule 4 cites rule 3; rule 6 cites rule 3 and rule 5; rule 5 cites rule 11), satisfying N12.
